Top Rated Stocks | Are You Ready To Catch Up The 'Golden Momentum' In The Stock Market?
data.description:
Gold has reached a new record high, but this does not mean there are no more big opportunities correlated with this precious metal. In our view, the next big deal is hiding in plain sight - the stock market, because this company is truly poised to capitalize on this golden momentum and prove itself to be the perfect bet in a shifting economic landscape.

HERE ARE OUR PICKS FOR THIS WEEK!

----------------------------------------------------------

Newmont Corporation (NEM): Gold's Glimmer Amidst Volatility

Current Share Price: $44.04 

Market Capitalization: $49.31B 

Median Target Price: $52.50

Recommendation: Buy

Newmont Corporation (NEM) is a leading gold mining company, renowned for its expansive operations across multiple continents, significantly influencing the global supply of this precious metal.

Financially, Newmont stands robust with total revenue reaching $18.68 billion, reflecting a remarkable revenue growth of 42.8%. Gross profits are substantial at $9.39 billion, yielding a gross margin of 50.27%, while the EBITDA margins stand at an impressive 46.71%, demonstrating high operational efficiency. The operating margins are also strong at 40.85%.

Newmont's liquidity position is noteworthy, with total cash reserves of $3.64 billion ($3.21 per share) and a formidable operating cash flow of $6.36 billion. However, the company carries a significant debt load, with total debt amounting to $8.97 billion, resulting in a debt-to-equity ratio of 29.80%.

The company showcases positive profitability metrics with a return on assets (ROA) of 6.61% and a return on equity (ROE) of 11.17%, highlighting effective asset and equity management. Profit margins are strong at 17.92%, signaling an effective cost structure and profitability.

Analysts recommend a Buy rating with a mean score of 1.95. Price targets range from $45.00 to $65.43, with the median target set at $52.50. The market sentiment is positive about Newmont's ability to navigate market volatility and continue delivering strong financial performance.

Newmont Corporation offers a stable investment opportunity in the often volatile mining sector, fortified by its robust financials, operational efficiency, and significant market position, making it an attractive choice for investors seeking exposure to precious metals.

FactSet Research Systems Inc. (FDS): Data Powerhouse in Financial Analytics

Current Share Price: $461.56 

Market Capitalization: $17.50B 

Median Target Price: $486.00

Recommendation: Hold

FactSet Research Systems Inc. (FDS) is a premier provider of financial data and analytics, servicing global investment professionals with comprehensive data solutions integrated with advanced technology.

Financially, FactSet exhibits steady performance with total revenue reaching $2.23 billion, reflecting a revenue growth of 4.9%. Gross profits stand at $1.21 billion, translating to a gross margin of 54.29%, while the EBITDA margins are substantial at 38.03%, demonstrating effective operational efficiency. The operating margins are strong at 34.25%.

FactSet maintains a solid liquidity position with total cash reserves of $358.79 million ($9.43 per share) and a healthy operating cash flow of $631.57 million. The company holds moderate debt, with total debt amounting to $1.55 billion, resulting in a debt-to-equity ratio of 77.93%.

The company showcases commendable profitability metrics with a return on assets (ROA) of 11.16% and a return on equity (ROE) of 29.17%, indicating effective management of its assets and equity. Profit margins are robust at 24.16%, highlighting the strong profitability inherent in its business model.

Analysts have issued a Hold recommendation with a mean rating of 3.29. Price targets vary from $390.00 to $536.00, with the median target set at $486.00. The market sentiment reflects cautious optimism towards FactSet's continued growth amidst market challenges.

FactSet Research Systems Inc. remains a formidable player in the financial analytics sector, supported by steady revenue growth, strong profitability, and a well-structured financial position. It is a viable option for investors seeking exposure to the financial data and analytics market.

data.title: Nvidia Q4 Preview: No Panic! DeepSeek Sparks China's AI Chip Boom
data.description:
On February 26, after U.S. markets close, AI leader NVIDIA will report its latest earnings, marking the grand finale of the Q4 earnings season. 

Recently, DeepSeek's emergence has shaken the AI landscape by achieving results comparable to ChatGPT at a fraction of the cost. This has sparked market concerns over whether demand for GPUs will remain as strong as before. NVIDIA's stock saw a brief tumble but has since recovered its losses. However, Nvidia's stock has fallen nearly 10% YTD, underperforming the S&P 500 and losing its leading position.

Data Center Growth: Can It Withstand DeepSeek's Disruption?

The market's primary focus is NVIDIA's data center business—whether it can maintain its high growth trajectory. Earnings reports from six other Magnificent Seven tech giants indicate that capital expenditures remain robust, suggesting strong GPU demand.

Beyond tech giants, AI startups are also driving demand. Elon Musk's xAI, for example, has launched the Grok 3 model, which runs on 200,000 NVIDIA H100 GPUs, with plans to scale up to 1 million GPUs in the future.

Interestingly, DeepSeek's rise may not necessarily be a negative for NVIDIA. According to Reuters, citing six industry insiders, demand for low-cost AI models like DeepSeek has led to a surge in purchases of NVIDIA's H20 chips, which are designed specifically for China due to U.S. export controls. Moreover, smaller companies in sectors like healthcare and education are now buying AI servers with DeepSeek models and NVIDIA H20 chips—previously a privilege of deep-pocketed financial and telecom firms. Alibaba has also announced that its capital expenditure over the next three years will exceed the past decade's total. With U.S.-China relations showing signs of thawing, potential easing of export controls could further benefit NVIDIA's business in China.

Blackwell GPU: Market Demand in Focus

NVIDIA's next-generation Blackwell GPU is now in production, and market expectations are sky-high. During the earnings call, CEO Jensen Huang's comments on Blackwell's demand will be a critical focus.

Wedbush analysts report that despite DeepSeek's disruptive potential, their surveys indicate that demand for NVIDIA's Blackwell GPUs still far exceeds supply.

UBS forecasts that NVIDIA's Blackwell revenue will hit $9 billion in Q4 2024, well above the expected $5 billion, and expects Q1 2025 revenue to exceed $20 billion with 700,000 units shipped.

Key Partners Reinforce Bullish Sentiment

The strong performance of NVIDIA's key partners, such as TSMC and Super Micro Computer, further supports the bullish case for NVIDIA.

Reports suggest that NVIDIA has secured over 70% of TSMC's CoWoS-L advanced packaging capacity for 2025 to meet demand for Blackwell GPUs. Analysts estimate that NVIDIA's Blackwell chip shipments will grow over 20% per quarter, with annual shipments surpassing 2 million units.

On February 5, Super Micro Computer announced that data center systems featuring NVIDIA's Blackwell GPUs are ready for delivery, alleviating concerns about potential supply chain constraints.

data.title: Malibu Boats: Sales Drop, Stock Soars!
Morgan Stanley Boosts AMT: Towering Gains Ahead?
Sun Country Airlines Extends Schedule Through Fall 2025: A Smart Move for Growth and Profitability
data.description:
Sun Country Airlines, the Minneapolis-based ultra-low-cost carrier, has announced an extension of its schedule through fall 2025. This strategic move aligns with the airline's growth strategy and commitment to maximizing profitability. By extending its schedule, Sun Country aims to capitalize on the growing demand for leisure travel and tap into new revenue streams.

Sun Country's diversified business model, which includes scheduled passenger flights, charter flights, and cargo flights, contributes significantly to its financial resilience and stability. This model allows the airline to generate revenue and profits from multiple sources, reducing its dependence on a single line of business. For instance, in the first quarter of 2023, Sun Country's charter business revenue jumped 40.5% compared to the previous year, contributing significantly to the company's overall profitability (Source: Sun Country Q1 2023 Earnings Release).

Sun Country's capacity management strategy, which involves adjusting flying to peak demand periods, contributes to its competitive advantage in the airline industry. By optimizing capacity allocation, Sun Country can avoid the pitfalls of overcapacity, which can lead to lower fares and reduced profitability. In the second quarter of 2024, Sun Country's revenue from its scheduled-airline operation sank 21% year on year, with average fares declining 20% in one year, largely due to overcapacity in the industry (Source: Sun Country's second-quarter financial results, August 2024).

Sun Country's ability to manage capacity effectively has contributed to its strong financial performance. In the fourth quarter of 2024, the airline reported a record fourth quarter revenue of $260.4 million and a pretax earnings margin of 121.0% (Source: Sun Country's fourth-quarter earnings release, February 2025). This demonstrates that Sun Country's capacity management strategy is not only beneficial for its competitive position but also for its bottom line.

In conclusion, Sun Country Airlines' decision to extend its schedule through fall 2025 is a smart move that aligns with the airline's growth strategy and commitment to maximizing profitability. By leveraging its diversified business model and effective capacity management, Sun Country is well-positioned to capitalize on the growing demand for leisure travel and tap into new revenue streams. Investors should keep a close eye on Sun Country's progress as it continues to execute on its expansion plans.

data.title: International Game Technology's Q4 2024: Contradictions on Italy Lotto Timeline, CapEx, and Mega Millions Pricing
data.description:
These are the key contradictions discussed in International Game Technology PLC's latest 2024Q4 earnings call, specifically including: Italy Lotto RFP timeline, CapEx guidance, and expectations regarding the Mega Millions price increase:



Lottery Business and Strategic Focus:
- IGT generated over $1 billion in consolidated cash from operations and about $660 million in free cash flow in 2024, with more than 80% of free cash flow coming from lottery operations.
- The strategic focus on the lottery business resulted from the announced sale of the gaming and digital business for more than $4 billion in cash, aiming to provide products and services to more lotteries than any other company.

Revenue and Profitability:
- IGT reported $2.5 billion in revenue for the year, consistent with 2023, with $1.2 billion in EBITDA and a margin of 47%.
- The stability in revenue was due to consistent core instant ticket and draw game sales, offset by lower US multi-state jackpot sales.

International Operations and Growth:
- IGT's operations in Italy saw a 7% same-store sales growth in the fourth quarter, driven by new game launches and special draws.
- The success in Italy is attributed to strategic product innovation and the introduction of new technologies like the Infinity print technology.

iLottery and Digital Platform Expansion:
- IGT's iLottery sales rose 28% in both the fourth quarter and full year 2024, with strong performance in the US, Italy, and Europe.
- Growth was driven by the deployment of the iLottery platform in 11 jurisdictions and successful player acquisition programs.

data.title: 3D Systems' Stock Plummets 7%: Stratasys Merger Boost Fizzles
CEO Exit: Weave Shares Plummet 3.69%
Graphs Worth 1000 Words: U.S Stocks Lose Steam as China Tech Takes Lead
data.description:
A Graph is worth a 1,000 words—let's take a look at some intriguing charts!

The unstoppable rally in U.S. stocks seems to be losing steam this year. The three major U.S. indices have posted only single-digit gains, underperforming both Chinese and European assets.

Adding to concerns, insider selling in U.S. stocks has been rising steadily, signaling that corporate executives are cashing out aggressively.

The 10 largest U.S. stock ETFs have recently seen a sharp outflow of funds, indicating that investors may be rotating out of U.S. equities.

Meanwhile, Chinese internet ETFs listed in the U.S. have recorded strong inflows. Led by Alibaba, Chinese tech stocks are gaining traction and may soon take over the leadership role previously held by the Magnificent 7.

Macro Outlook: Inflation Fears & Fed Policy

On the macro front, long-term U.S. inflation expectations for the next 5–10 years have climbed to a 30-year high, driven by Trump's aggressive tariff policies. The hotter-than-expected January CPI report has also cast doubt on Fed rate cuts this year.

Signs of Recovery in China's Real Estate Market

China's real estate sector is showing early signs of stabilization and recovery. Developers are once again bidding aggressively for land, reflecting a return of confidence in the property market.

According to China Index Academy, 37% of land transactions worth over ¥1 billion(approximate $0.138 Bln) this year were sold at premiums exceeding 20%. This marks a significant rebound from just 14% in 2024 and under 5% in 2023. For comparison, during the real estate boom of 2017, this figure surpassed 60%!

Notably, over 60% of developers purchasing land at premiums are state-backed enterprises (SOBs). With major private developers like Evergrande and Country Garden facing severe financial distress, SOBs have stepped in decisively to stabilize market confidence. Since the property downturn began in 2021, SOBs have consistently accounted for more than 50% of premium land acquisitions.

data.title: DeepSeek Looks To Launch Its New AI Model Earlier Than Expected
data.description:
According to the media report, DeepSeek is planning to accelerate the release of its next-generation AI model, R2.

Sources familiar with the matter revealed that R2 was originally scheduled for release in early May, but the company now aims to launch it sooner. DeepSeek stated that the new model will feature improvements in programming capabilities and multilingual reasoning.

Vijayasimha Alilughatta, Chief Operating Officer of Indian tech service provider Zensar, believes that "The launch of DeepSeek's R2 model could be a pivotal moment in the AI industry." He added that its cost-effective approach to AI model development "would likely spur companies worldwide to accelerate their own efforts ... breaking the stranglehold of the few dominant players in the field."

Analysts attribute DeepSeek's success to over a decade of substantial investment in research and computing power by its backer, quantitative hedge fund "High-Flyer". Between 2020 and 2021, Huanfang invested 1.2 billion yuan to establish two AI supercomputing clusters, which include approximately 10,000 Nvidia A100 chips.

Former employees of DeepSeek noted that the company's success is largely due to founder Liang Wenfeng's focus on more cost-effective AI architectures. DeepSeek has adopted technologies such as Mixture of Experts (MoE) and Multi-Head Latent Attention (MLA), significantly reducing computational costs.

The report also highlighted DeepSeek's flat management structure, which fosters a collaborative atmosphere. Founder Liang Wenfeng, described by former colleagues as low-key and introverted, prefers to dive into technical details alongside younger employees.

A former employee quoted in the report said, Liang gave us control and treated us as experts. He constantly asked questions and learned alongside us.

In general, DeepSeek looks to challenge industry giants and inspire global enterprises to accelerate their AI efforts once again, and this time, it may aim to completely shape the future of the AI industry.

data.title: CubicFarms' HydroGreen Expands Partnership with BoomA Food Group in Australia, Announces Sale of Two DGS 66 Units for Research
data.description:
CubicFarms Systems Corp. (TSXV: CUB) (OTC Pink: CUBXF), a leading agricultural technology innovator, has announced the extension of its exclusivity agreement with BoomA Food Group in Australia. This strategic move empowers BoomA Food Group to further explore and expand opportunities across Oceania, reinforcing HydroGreen's growing presence in the region. Together, the companies are advancing sustainable, climate-friendly feed solutions that equip livestock producers with cutting-edge technology.

As part of this agreement, HydroGreen is announcing the sale of two DGS 66 Units to BoomA Food Group. These units will be deployed in New South Wales to establish a Proof of Concept (POC) and research program, demonstrating the efficiency, scalability, and sustainability of HydroGreen's automated feed systems in real-world conditions. This initiative underscores a shared commitment to innovation and climate-smart agriculture, setting the stage for broader adoption of HydroGreen's transformative technology across the region.

Revolutionizing Sustainable Livestock Feed Production
HydroGreen's innovative, fully automated systems streamline every step of the feed production process, including seeding, watering, lighting, harvesting, and re-seeding. This ensures a consistent, nutrient-dense feed supply while significantly reducing labour demands. The systems use up to 95% less water than traditional field irrigation methods, making them a drought-resilient alternative for livestock feed production. This state-of-the-art technology provides a scalable, eco-friendly alternative to traditional forage, making it a game-changer for large-scale livestock operations looking to optimize efficiency and minimize environmental impact.

By partnering with forward-thinking organizations like BoomA Food Group, HydroGreen is accelerating innovation and driving sustainable transformation in livestock agriculture-particularly in water-scarce regions where efficient farming practices are critical. The extension of the exclusivity agreement with BoomA Food Group in Australia supports CubicFarms' global expansion strategy by enhancing its presence in the region, demonstrating the efficiency of its technology, contributing to a more sustainable food system, and strengthening Australia's competitive edge in beef and dairy exports.



A Sustainable Solution for Australia's Cattle Industry
With approximately 28.8 million head of cattle as of 2023, Australia represents a key market for HydroGreen's innovative feed solutions. Given the ongoing challenges of water scarcity in Australian agriculture, the demand for resource-efficient, sustainable farming technologies has never been greater. HydroGreen's systems use up to 95% less water than traditional field irrigation methods, offering a revolutionary, drought-resilient alternative for livestock feed production. By drastically reducing water consumption, these systems support long-term agricultural sustainability and enhance the resilience of livestock operations in regions prone to extreme climate conditions.

In conclusion, the partnership with BoomA Food Group contributes to the advancement of sustainable, climate-friendly feed solutions in the Australian livestock industry by driving efficiency, enhancing sustainability, and future-proofing operations in a rapidly evolving industry. The sale of two DGS 66 Units for a POC and research program further demonstrates the commitment of both companies to innovation and climate-smart agriculture, setting the stage for broader adoption of HydroGreen's transformative technology across the region.

data.title: "Qubetics, Bitcoin, Chainlink: Revolutionizing Crypto Landscape"
data.description:
The cryptocurrency landscape is dynamic, with new projects emerging alongside established giants. Qubetics, Bitcoin, and Chainlink are three prominent projects making waves in the crypto ecosystem. This article explores their unique contributions and potential.

Qubetics is revolutionizing real-world asset tokenization by creating a marketplace that bridges physical assets with blockchain technology. This enables businesses, professionals, and individuals to tokenize assets such as real estate, art, and commodities, allowing for fractional ownership and increased liquidity. The Qubetics crypto presale is currently in its 23rd stage, offering $TICS tokens at $0.0888 each. Over 489 million tokens have been sold to more than 21,200 holders, raising upwards of $14 million. Analysts predict the $TICS token could reach $0.25 by the end of the presale, representing a potential return on investment of 181.52%.

One of Qubetics' standout features is its Real-World Asset Tokenization Marketplace. This platform simplifies the process for asset owners to tokenize their holdings, providing a seamless experience for both issuers and investors. By leveraging blockchain technology, Qubetics ensures transparency, security, and efficiency in transactions, addressing challenges that traditional asset markets often face. The potential applications of Qubetics' platform are vast, extending to various industries seeking to unlock the value of their assets.

Bitcoin, the first and most well-known cryptocurrency, continues to lead the market with a current price of $95,381. Since its inception in 2009, Bitcoin has established itself as a digital alternative to traditional currencies, offering a decentralized and secure method of transferring value. One of Bitcoin's key strengths lies in its decentralized nature, operating on a peer-to-peer network without a central authority. This structure ensures that transactions are transparent, secure, and resistant to censorship. Over the years, Bitcoin has gained acceptance as a legitimate form of payment, with numerous merchants and institutions integrating it into their payment systems.

However, Bitcoin is not without challenges. Scalability issues have led to network congestion and higher transaction fees during peak periods. To address these concerns, developments such as the Lightning Network aim to enhance transaction speeds and reduce costs by enabling off-chain transactions. Despite these hurdles, Bitcoin's influence on the broader

data.title: "Coins.xyz Australia Expands Token Offerings, Launches AUD Spot Pairs"
data.description:
Coins.xyz Australia, a locally regulated cryptocurrency exchange, is expanding its token offerings and launching AUD spot pairs, giving Australians greater access to top digital assets and a smoother trading experience. The exchange has introduced seven new tokens, including ADA, LTC, POL (Polygon), LINK, TRX, UNI, and TRUMP, on its Convert feature, which allows users to easily buy and sell crypto with a click of a button. Additionally, the exchange has introduced AUD spot pairs BTC/AUD and USDT/AUD.

With this expansion, Australians can seamlessly trade some of the most sought-after cryptocurrencies directly with AUD, eliminating the friction of foreign currency conversions and allowing for a smoother trading experience. The launch of AUD trading pairs on Spot also provides traders with a more efficient way to enter and exit positions at large volumes, setting Coins.xyz apart from other exchanges in the country.

James Prosser, Global Marketing Growth Lead of Coins.xyz, stated, "Crypto is about momentum, and at Coins.xyz Australia, we’re making moves that matter. More tokens, more AUD pairs, and a seamless trading experience, all designed to put Australian traders in the best position to succeed. We’re getting the basics out of the way, laying the foundation. The real game-changers? They’re coming next."

Wei Zhou, Founder and CEO of Coins.xyz and ex-CFO of Binance, emphasized the exchange's mission to empower Australian traders. "Our goal is to provide Australians with easy access to top cryptocurrencies while ensuring a seamless and secure trading experience. By expanding our tokens and introducing AUD spot pairs, we are taking a significant step toward making crypto more accessible in Australia,” said Zhou.

This expansion marks the first phase of a broader initiative to expand Coins.xyz’s footprint in the country. In addition to listing new tokens, the exchange is actively exploring ways to expand its product offerings, ensuring Aussies have access to a wider range of crypto services. As part of its commitment to the Australian market, Coins.xyz will also be launching community engagement activities, grassroots initiatives, and on-the-ground activations to connect with local crypto communities and educate new to crypto users to drive greater adoption across the country.
